context: Our return policy allows returns within 30 days of purchase with original receipt. Items must be in original condition with tags attached. We do not accept returns on clearance items.
ground_truth: You can return items within 30 days of purchase with your original receipt. Items should be in their original condition with tags still attached. Note that clearance items are not eligible for returns.

prompt: How do I reset my password?
context: To reset your password, click on 'Forgot Password' on the login page. Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to create a new password. The link expires after 24 hours.
ground_truth: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page, enter your email, and follow the link we send to create a new password. The reset link expires after 24 hours.

context: We are open Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 6 PM EST. We are closed on weekends and major holidays including New Year's Day, Independence Day, Thanksgiving, and Christmas.
ground_truth: Our hours are Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 6 PM EST. We're closed on weekends and holidays like New Year's Day, July 4th, Thanksgiving, and Christmas.

context: You can reach our support team via email at support@example.com or by phone at 1-800-555-0123. Live chat is available during business hours (Mon-Fri, 9 AM - 6 PM EST).
ground_truth: Contact us at support@example.com, call 1-800-555-0123, or use our live chat during business hours (Mon-Fri, 9 AM - 6 PM EST).

context: We ship to over 50 countries worldwide. International shipping takes 7-14 business days. Shipping costs vary by destination and start at $9.99. Orders over $100 qualify for free international shipping.
ground_truth: Yes, we ship to 50+ countries. International delivery takes 7-14 business days with costs starting at $9.99. Orders over $100 get free international shipping.

prompt: What payment methods do you accept?
context: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Discover), PayPal, Apple Pay, and Google Pay. We do not accept cash or checks.
ground_truth: We accept credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, Amex, Discover), PayPal, Apple Pay, and Google Pay. Cash and checks are not accepted.

context: Standard shipping takes 5-7 business days within the US. Express shipping is 2-3 business days. Same-day delivery is available in select cities for orders placed before 2 PM EST.
ground_truth: Standard US shipping is 5-7 business days, express is 2-3 days, and same-day delivery is available in select cities for orders before 2 PM EST.

context: Yes, once your order ships, you'll receive a tracking number via email. You can track your order on our website by entering the tracking number or logging into your account.
ground_truth: Yes, you'll get a tracking number by email when your order ships. Track it on our website or through your account.

prompt: Do you have a loyalty program?
context: Our rewards program gives you 1 point per dollar spent. Points can be redeemed for discounts, free products, and exclusive offers. Members get early access to sales and special promotions.
ground_truth: Yes, earn 1 point per dollar spent. Redeem points for discounts and free products. Members get early sale access and special offers.

context: We collect only necessary information to process orders and improve our services. We never sell your data to third parties. You can request deletion of your data at any time by contacting privacy@example.com.
ground_truth: We only collect info needed for orders and service improvement. We don't sell your data. Request data deletion anytime at privacy@example.com.
